mechanism: PC1 (dollar factor) accounting for 50-70% of variance means carry portfolios are heavily exposed to a single risk factor regardless of pair count. Stress-period dimensionality collapse (correlations to 0.85+) concentrates all pairs onto a single factor, explaining why nominally diversified carry portfolios experience extreme drawdowns.
regime_dependence: Dimensionality collapse is specifically a stress phenomenon. During calm markets, effective independent risk factors approach 2-3, providing some diversification benefit.
